audit_summary.summary_text: Reviewed the provided SKILL.md for the retry-helper skill. The content is consistent with its stated purpose of adding retry logic, exponential backoff, circuit breaker behavior, and per-attempt timeouts. No instruction overrides, hidden instructions, exfiltration behavior, credential access, environment harvesting, remote script fetching, obfuscated code, or reverse shell patterns were identified. No implementation files were provided for analysis, so this assessment is based on the supplied skill definition only.
